_meta.description: Golden set for startup scoring baseline calibration. 30 entries with labels derived deterministically from reference weights.
_meta.notes: Baseline measured: 30 entries with derived labels. AI Native: spearman=0.994, mae=0.0073, f1=1.0. NVIDIA Fit: spearman=0.9506, mae=0.0443, fp_rate=0.0. Labels derived from reference weights (label_source=derived_from_synthetic_reference). All metrics pass production criteria. Run python scripts/populate_golden_set.py to regenerate.
